title: Add a domain term
description: Creates one file for a domain term under project-docs/domain-terms/, with structured frontmatter (aliases, disambiguation) and a free-text definition body. Bootstraps the domain-terms/README.md convention doc on first use.

term.description: The canonical domain term, as domain experts use it (e.g. "Case").

project.description: Scope this term to a specific project's project-docs/domain-terms/ instead of the workspace root — use when a bounded context spans a domain library and its consuming apps.
